rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: Study of AI generation scaling faster than human review capacity.
rationale.quality-debt: Documents practitioner reports of technical debt and codebase degradation.
rationale.method-mining: Qualitatively analyzed 1,154 Reddit and Hacker News posts.
rationale.risk-quality: Analyzes codebase and knowledge resource degradation as key themes.
rationale.risk-security: Highlights practitioner reports of AI introducing dangerous security bypasses.
rationale.risk-overreliance: Analyzes themes of skill atrophy and producer comprehension gaps.
rationale.assistive: Discusses AI slop from inline tools like Cursor.
rationale.agentic: Discusses burden of reviewing autonomous PRs from AI agents.
rationale.survey-input: Developer concern taxonomy informs organizational surveys on AI adoption.
